privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated CDM file created dynamically at /home/ga/Desktop/cdm_comms_leo_7.txt during setup. The required output paths for the GMAT script (/home/ga/Documents/missions/conjunction_assessment.script) and the assessment report (/home/ga/GMAT_output/conjunction_assessment.txt) exactly match the task description and verifier.py scoring logic. The threshold for requiring an avoidance maneuver is explicitly verified as 1.0 km in the verifier logic.
